programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Day 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour – Miami Beach Round 2026
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: PSG vs Lyon - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lyon are the side Paris SG have faced most often under Luis Enrique among those against whom they have a 100% winning record in all competitions. None of the last 10 Ligue 1 games between Paris SG and Lyon at the Parc des Princes have ended in a draw, with PSG winning eight times and OL twice. This could be the PSG's 600th home victory in the top-flight.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.desc: Each EPL Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: UEFA UCL Magazine 2025/2026 - MD14 Review
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Deportivo Alaves - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won their last eight matches against Alavés in LaLiga and could equal their best run of consecutive victories against the Vitoria side in the competition's history, achieved between 2002 and 2018. Following their victories in May 2000 and November 2020, Alavés became the first away team to beat Real Madrid at both the Estadio Bernabéu and the Alfredo Di Stéfano in LaLiga. Levante later achieved this feat, winning 0-1 in 2007 and 1-2 in 2018 at Estadio Bernabéu, and 1-2 in 2021 at Alfredo Di Stéfano.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027

programme.title: Everton vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs West Ham United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won five of their last seven Premier League games against West Ham, and are looking to win three consecutive league games against the Hammers for the first time. West Ham have won three of their last five Premier League away games against Crystal Palace, scoring at least twice in all five of those matches.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Aston Villa have lost just one of their last 13 league games against Sunderland, going down 3-1 at the Stadium of Light in January 2016. Sunderland haven’t won any of their last six away league games against Aston Villa. This is their first visit since a 2-1 loss in the Championship in November 2017, and their first in the Premier League since a 2-2 draw in August 2015.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs West Ham United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won five of their last seven Premier League games against West Ham, and are looking to win three consecutive league games against the Hammers for the first time. West Ham have won three of their last five Premier League away games against Crystal Palace, scoring at least twice in all five of those matches.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Leeds have won their last four Premier League games against Wolves – only against Sunderland, Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham have they won more consecutively in the competition. Wolves have only lost one of their last five away league games against Leeds, though it was on their last visit in August 2022.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs a.f.c. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last seven Premier League games against Bournemouth, with five of those finishing level. Bournemouth have won three of their seven Premier League away games against Newcastle, only winning more on the road at Wolves in the competition.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Burnley - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley, beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024. Burnley have won just two of their last 21 away league games against Nottingham Forest. Each of their last three visits has finished 1-1, with this season’s reverse fixture also finishing by that scoreline.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton, having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight. Brighton have won two of their last four away league games against Spurs, including a 4-1 victory last season. They’d only won one of their first nine visits between 1977 and 2020.

Lorient are currently on a 13-game winless run against Olympique de Marseille, their longest current drought against a top-flight side. Lorient have won just 12% of their home games against Olympique de Marseille in Ligue 1, their lowest win rate against a team they have hosted more than ten times in the top-flight.

programme.title: Athletic Bilbao vs Osasuna - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Osasuna, drawing the last two. Only once have the Basque side recorded three consecutive draws against Osasuna in the competition's history, between 1989 and 1990. Osasuna have drawn on their last three visits to San Mamés in LaLiga; only two teams have recorded four or more consecutive away draws against Athletic Club in the competition's history: FC Barcelona between 1966 and 1970 and Getafe between 2022 and 2024.

programme.title: Andrey Rublev vs Arthur Fils - Singles Final - Day 7 - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. programme.title: Karolina Muchova (CZE) vs Victoria Mboko (CAN ) - Mini Match - WTA 1000 Qatar TotalEnergies Open

programme.title: Australian Open Official Film "The Score"

programme.title: Mariano Navone (ARG) vs Daniel Merida (ESP) - Final - ATP 250 - Tiriac Open, Bucharest Romania - 202
programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.title: Limoges vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Nantes vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Rayyan vs Al Shamal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W13
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
